checkEmail.codePrompt: Opened the link on another device or browser? Enter the code it shows you:

checkEmail.signInFailed: Could not complete sign in. Please resend the email and try again.

callback.verificationSub: Enter this code where you first tried to sign in.
callback.verificationExpiry: This code expires in 5 minutes and can only be used once.

callback.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we complete your sign in.
